mapper.select:
SELECT a.AREA_ID as "areaId", a.REGION_ID as "regionId", a.SEARCH_TYPE as "searchType", a.NAME as "name", a.MAP_X as "mapX", a.MAP_Y as "mapY", a.CATEGORY as "category", a.ADDRESS as "address", a.ROAD_ADDRESS as "roadAddress", a.LINK as "link", a.TELEPHONE as "telephone", a.DESCRIPTION as "description", a.BOOKMARK_COUNT as "bookmarkCount", a.CREATE_DATE as "createDate", a.LATEST_DATE as "latestDate", a.STATUS as "status" FROM AREA a INNER JOIN REGION r ON a.region_id = r.region_id
AND a.region_id = #{regionId}

SELECT a.AREA_ID as "areaId", a.REGION_ID as "regionId", a.SEARCH_TYPE as "searchType", a.NAME as "name", a.MAP_X as "mapX", a.MAP_Y as "mapY", a.CATEGORY as "category", a.ADDRESS as "address", a.ROAD_ADDRESS as "roadAddress", a.LINK as "link", a.TELEPHONE as "telephone", a.DESCRIPTION as "description", a.BOOKMARK_COUNT as "bookmarkCount", a.CREATE_DATE as "createDate", a.LATEST_DATE as "latestDate", a.STATUS as "status" FROM AREA a INNER JOIN REGION r ON a.region_id = r.region_id WHERE r.zdo_code = #{zdoCode}

SELECT REGION_ID as "regionId", SEARCH_TYPE as "searchType", NAME as "name", MAP_X as "mapX", MAP_Y as "mapY", CATEGORY as "category", ADDRESS as "address", ROAD_ADDRESS as "roadAddress", LINK as "link", TELEPHONE as "telephone" FROM AREA WHERE AREA_ID = #{areaId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: BEGIN INSERT INTO AREA ( SEARCH_TYPE, REGION_ID, PLACE_ID, NAME, CATEGORY, MAP_X, MAP_Y, ADDRESS, ROAD_ADDRESS, LINK, TELEPHONE, DESCRIPTION, BOOKMARK_COUNT ) VALUES ( 'PLACE', #{regionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{placeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mapX, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mapY, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roadAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telephone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 ) RETURNING AREA_ID INTO #{areaId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}; END;
